creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Branislav,

please note that the best way to get a new port added into the ports
collection is to create it and send a shar archive as described in the
Porter's Handbook [1]. It's not too hard, and if there are problems with
porting the software, usually the people on the ports mailing list
(ports@) can help.

Regards,
Stefan

[1]: http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/index.html
